summary: Iteration 223 — Breed isolation fix validation. All critical fixes verified: (1) Pillar products strict breed filter working correctly — Shih Tzu sees ZERO Bernese/Akita/Labrador products in Play, (2) Indie sees ZERO cross-breed products in Play, (3) Soul Made breed-catalogue returns only correct-breed products (Indie→Indie only, Labrador→Labrador only, Shih Tzu→Shih Tzu only with zero cross-breed), (4) CareMobilePage loads without parse errors with Grooming/Dental/Coat dim pills visible, (5) Universal products (all_breeds tagged) correctly show for all breeds.
critical_code_review_comments: pillar_products_routes.py: The fetch_limit is `min(limit * 4, 400)` when breed is specified. For large datasets, this may still miss products. Consider increasing to 800 or using pagination. Current behavior: 59 products returned for Shih Tzu/Indie — acceptable.
PersonalisedBreedSection.jsx line 205: imgUrl priority is watercolor_image > cloudinary_url > mockup_url > primary_image > image_url > image > images[0] — correct as per requirement.
breed_catalogue.py: Post-fetch safety filter (_detect_product_breed) is applied for cross-breed name check after MongoDB query — correct pattern.

_should_show_for_breed() step 2 (lines 66-67): For breed_pick/soul_made without breed in name, falls back to `req in name_lower`. This is restrictive for soul_made products without breed keyword in name — may need review if Soul Made products have non-breed names.

success_rate.frontend: 100% (CareMobilePage parse-error fix confirmed, Play page breed isolation confirmed)

context_for_next_testing_agent: All breed isolation fixes verified in iteration 223. Key verified facts: (1) /api/admin/pillar-products?pillar=play&breed=Shih+Tzu returns 59 products, zero Bernese/Akita/Labrador products. (2) /api/breed-catalogue/products?breed=Indie returns 45 products, all named 'Indie ...' with breed=indie. (3) /api/breed-catalogue/products?breed=Labrador returns 90 products all Labrador-named. (4) CareMobilePage at /care on mobile (390px): data-testid=care-mobile present, care-dim-grooming and care-dim-dental pills visible, no console errors, no parse error. (5) Play page with Mojo (Indie) shows correct profile card 'Indie · short coat'. Previous known issue: MiraOSPage 'body stream already read' console error (non-breaking) reported in iter 222.
